# MindCheck Tools

> Free, validated mental health and substance use screening tools. All tools are anonymous, clinically validated, and scored entirely in your browser — no data is stored or transmitted. Reviewed by a Certified Drug and Alcohol Counselor (CADC-II) with 11 years of clinical experience.

## Core Screening Tools

- [PHQ-9 Depression Test](https://mindchecktools.com/phq-9-depression-test): 9-item validated depression screening; scores 0–27 across five severity levels
- [GAD-7 Anxiety Test](https://mindchecktools.com/gad-7-anxiety-test): 7-item generalized anxiety screening; scores 0–21 across four severity levels
- [AUDIT Alcohol Test](https://mindchecktools.com/audit-alcohol-test): 10-item WHO alcohol use disorder screening; scores 0–40
- [AUDIT-C Alcohol Screen](https://mindchecktools.com/audit-c-alcohol-screen): 3-item brief alcohol consumption screening
- [DAST-10 Drug Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/dast-10-drug-screening): 10-item drug abuse screening test; scores 0–10
- [CAGE-AID Substance Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/cage-aid-substance-abuse-screening): 4-item alcohol and drug use screening
- [DASS-21](https://mindchecktools.com/dass-21-depression-anxiety-stress): Depression, anxiety, and stress measured simultaneously across three subscales
- [PCL-5 PTSD Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/pcl-5-ptsd-screening): 20-item PTSD symptom severity screening; scores 0–80
- [PC-PTSD-5 Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/pc-ptsd-5-screening): 5-item primary care PTSD gateway screening
- [ASRS ADHD Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/asrs-adhd-screening): WHO Adult ADHD Self-Report Scale v1.1
- [MDQ Bipolar Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/mdq-bipolar-screening): Mood Disorder Questionnaire for bipolar spectrum screening
- [OCI-R OCD Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/oci-r-ocd-screening): 18-item OCD symptom screening across six subscales; scores 0–72
- [MSI-BPD Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/msi-bpd-screening): McLean Screening Instrument for borderline personality disorder; 10 yes/no items
- [SPIN Social Anxiety Test](https://mindchecktools.com/spin-social-anxiety-test): Social Phobia Inventory; 17-item social anxiety screening
- [SCOFF Eating Disorder Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/scoff-eating-disorder-screening): 5-item eating disorder screening
- [AQ-10 Autism Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/aq-10-autism-screening): 10-item autism spectrum screening for adults
- [CRAFFT Substance Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/crafft-substance-screening): 6-item substance use screening designed for adolescents
- [WHO ASSIST Substance Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/who-assist-substance-screening): WHO Alcohol, Smoking and Substance Involvement Screening Test
- [CES-D Depression Scale](https://mindchecktools.com/ces-d-depression-scale): 20-item Center for Epidemiologic Studies Depression Scale
- [K6 Distress Scale](https://mindchecktools.com/k6-distress-scale): 6-item Kessler psychological distress screening
- [PHQ-4 Quick Screen](https://mindchecktools.com/phq-4-anxiety-depression-screen): Ultra-brief 4-item anxiety and depression screening
- [ACE Questionnaire](https://mindchecktools.com/ace-questionnaire): 10-item Adverse Childhood Experiences screening; scores 0–10
- [WHO-5 Wellbeing Index](https://mindchecktools.com/who-5-wellbeing-index): 5-item general wellbeing screening from the WHO
- [Holmes-Rahe Stress Inventory](https://mindchecktools.com/holmes-rahe-stress-inventory): Life event stress measurement based on 43 stressors
- [Rosenberg Self-Esteem Scale](https://mindchecktools.com/rosenberg-self-esteem-scale): 10-item global self-esteem measure; scores 0–30
- [UCLA Loneliness Scale](https://mindchecktools.com/ucla-loneliness-scale): 20-item loneliness and social isolation screening
- [Athens Insomnia Scale](https://mindchecktools.com/athens-insomnia-scale): 8-item insomnia screening based on ICD-10 criteria
- [Brief Resilience Scale](https://mindchecktools.com/brief-resilience-scale): 6-item measure of ability to bounce back from stress
- [Big Five Personality Test](https://mindchecktools.com/big-five-personality-test): Measures openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, and neuroticism
- [Attachment Style Quiz](https://mindchecktools.com/attachment-style-quiz): Self-assessment of secure, anxious, avoidant, or disorganized attachment patterns

## Burnout and Workplace Screening

- [Burnout Assessment Tool](https://mindchecktools.com/burnout-assessment-tool): Multi-dimensional burnout screening across exhaustion, cynicism, and efficacy
- [Work Stress Check](https://mindchecktools.com/work-stress-check): Workplace stress self-assessment
- [Compassion Fatigue Test](https://mindchecktools.com/compassion-fatigue-test): Screening for secondary traumatic stress in caregivers and helping professionals
- [Caregiver Burnout Assessment](https://mindchecktools.com/caregiver-burnout-assessment): Burnout screening for family caregivers
- [Burnout Test for Healthcare Workers](https://mindchecktools.com/burnout-test-for-healthcare-workers): Burnout screening tailored for healthcare professionals
- [Burnout Test for Nurses](https://mindchecktools.com/burnout-test-for-nurses): Burnout screening tailored for nursing professionals
- [Burnout Test for Teachers](https://mindchecktools.com/burnout-test-for-teachers): Burnout screening tailored for educators
- [Burnout Test for Parents](https://mindchecktools.com/burnout-test-parents): Parental burnout self-assessment

## Audience-Targeted Screening Variants

- [Maternal Mental Health Hub](https://mindchecktools.com/maternal-mental-health): Educational hub about perinatal mental health screening using PHQ-9 and GAD-7, when to seek help, and treatment options
- [Postpartum Depression Test](https://mindchecktools.com/postpartum-depression-test): Depression screening for the perinatal period
- [Depression Test for Teens](https://mindchecktools.com/depression-test-for-teens): Depression screening adapted for adolescents
- [Depression Test for Men](https://mindchecktools.com/depression-test-for-men): Depression screening addressing male-specific presentation
- [Depression Test for Seniors](https://mindchecktools.com/depression-test-for-seniors): Depression screening for older adults
- [Depression Test for New Moms](https://mindchecktools.com/depression-test-for-new-moms): Postpartum depression screening for new mothers
- [Depression Screening for Veterans](https://mindchecktools.com/depression-screening-for-veterans): Depression screening for military veterans
- [Depression Screening for Men](https://mindchecktools.com/depression-screening-for-men): Depression screening highlighting male symptom patterns
- [Am I Depressed Quiz](https://mindchecktools.com/am-i-depressed-quiz): Conversational entry point for depression self-assessment
- [Anxiety Test for Women](https://mindchecktools.com/anxiety-test-for-women): Anxiety screening addressing female-specific concerns
- [Anxiety Test for Teens](https://mindchecktools.com/anxiety-test-for-teens): Anxiety screening adapted for adolescents
- [Anxiety Test for Men](https://mindchecktools.com/anxiety-test-for-men): Anxiety screening addressing male-specific presentation
- [ADHD Test for Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/adhd-test-adults): ADHD screening focused on adult symptom patterns
- [ADHD Test for Women](https://mindchecktools.com/adhd-test-women): ADHD screening addressing female-specific presentation
- [ADHD Test for Teens](https://mindchecktools.com/adhd-test-for-teens): ADHD screening adapted for adolescents
- [PTSD Test for Veterans](https://mindchecktools.com/ptsd-test-veterans): PTSD screening for military veterans
- [PTSD Test for First Responders](https://mindchecktools.com/ptsd-test-first-responders): PTSD screening for first responders
- [Do I Have PTSD Quiz](https://mindchecktools.com/do-i-have-ptsd-quiz): Conversational entry point for PTSD self-assessment
- [Bipolar Test for Young Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/bipolar-test-young-adults): Bipolar screening for young adults
- [BPD Screening for Young Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/bpd-screening-for-young-adults): Borderline personality disorder screening for young adults
- [BPD Test for Women](https://mindchecktools.com/bpd-test-for-women): BPD screening addressing female-specific presentation
- [OCD Test for Teens](https://mindchecktools.com/ocd-test-teens): OCD screening adapted for adolescents
- [Social Anxiety Test for College Students](https://mindchecktools.com/social-anxiety-test-college): Social anxiety screening for college students
- [Stress Test for College Students](https://mindchecktools.com/stress-test-college-students): Stress screening for college students
- [Alcohol Screening for College Students](https://mindchecktools.com/alcohol-screening-for-college-students): Alcohol use screening for college students
- [Alcohol Screening for Women](https://mindchecktools.com/alcohol-screening-for-women): Alcohol use screening with female-specific thresholds
- [Alcohol Screening for Military](https://mindchecktools.com/alcohol-screening-military): Alcohol use screening for military personnel
- [Am I an Alcoholic Quiz](https://mindchecktools.com/am-i-an-alcoholic-quiz): Conversational entry point for alcohol use self-assessment
- [Drug Screening for Teens](https://mindchecktools.com/drug-screening-teens): Substance use screening for adolescents
- [Substance Abuse Test for Parents](https://mindchecktools.com/substance-abuse-test-parents): Substance use screening with parenting context
- [Eating Disorder Test for Athletes](https://mindchecktools.com/eating-disorder-test-athletes): Eating disorder screening for athletes
- [Loneliness Test for Seniors](https://mindchecktools.com/loneliness-test-seniors): Loneliness screening for older adults
- [Attachment Style Test for Couples](https://mindchecktools.com/attachment-style-test-for-couples): Attachment style assessment for couples

## Recovery and Substance Use Tools

- [Sobriety Calculator](https://mindchecktools.com/sobriety-calculator): Track sobriety duration and milestones
- [BAC Calculator](https://mindchecktools.com/bac-calculator): Estimate blood alcohol concentration based on drinks, weight, and time
- [Standard Drinks Calculator](https://mindchecktools.com/standard-drinks-calculator): Calculate standard drink equivalents for different beverages
- [Money Saved in Recovery Calculator](https://mindchecktools.com/money-saved-recovery-calculator): Calculate money saved since quitting alcohol or drugs
- [Withdrawal Timeline](https://mindchecktools.com/withdrawal-timeline): Estimated substance withdrawal symptom timeline
- [Health Recovery Timeline](https://mindchecktools.com/health-recovery-timeline): Physical health improvements after quitting substances
- [Treatment Cost Estimator](https://mindchecktools.com/treatment-cost-estimator): Estimate costs of different addiction treatment options
- [Daily Recovery Check-In](https://mindchecktools.com/daily-recovery-check-in): Daily structured check-in for people in recovery
- [HALT Check-In](https://mindchecktools.com/halt-check-in): Hungry, Angry, Lonely, Tired — quick recovery check-in
- [Readiness to Change](https://mindchecktools.com/readiness-to-change): Assess your stage of readiness for behavior change
- [Relapse Prevention Plan](https://mindchecktools.com/relapse-prevention-plan): Build a structured relapse prevention plan with triggers and coping strategies
- [Trigger Identification Worksheet](https://mindchecktools.com/trigger-identification-worksheet): Identify and categorize personal relapse triggers

## Therapeutic and Wellness Tools

- [CBT Thought Record](https://mindchecktools.com/cbt-thought-record): Structured cognitive behavioral therapy thought record
- [Cognitive Distortion Identifier](https://mindchecktools.com/cognitive-distortion-identifier): Identify common thinking patterns that fuel anxiety and depression
- [DBT Crisis Skills](https://mindchecktools.com/dbt-crisis-skills): Dialectical behavior therapy crisis survival skills
- [Box Breathing Exercise](https://mindchecktools.com/box-breathing-exercise): Guided 4-4-4-4 breathing exercise for anxiety and stress reduction
- [Five Senses Grounding](https://mindchecktools.com/five-senses-grounding): 5-4-3-2-1 sensory grounding exercise for anxiety and dissociation
- [Urge Surfing Timer](https://mindchecktools.com/urge-surfing-timer): Guided urge surfing exercise for cravings and impulse management
- [Coping Skills Randomizer](https://mindchecktools.com/coping-skills-randomizer): Random evidence-based coping skill suggestions
- [Worry Time Scheduler](https://mindchecktools.com/worry-time-scheduler): Schedule structured worry time to reduce anxiety
- [Values Card Sort](https://mindchecktools.com/values-card-sort): Identify your core personal values through card sorting
- [Safety Plan](https://mindchecktools.com/safety-plan): Create a structured safety plan for crisis situations
- [Mental Load Calculator](https://mindchecktools.com/mental-load-calculator): Measure invisible cognitive and emotional labor
- [Sleep and Mood Check](https://mindchecktools.com/sleep-and-mood-check): Track the relationship between sleep quality and mood
- [Grief Assessment](https://mindchecktools.com/grief-assessment): Structured grief self-assessment
- [Family Impact Assessment](https://mindchecktools.com/family-impact-assessment): Assess how addiction or mental health issues affect the family

## Score Interpretation Pages

- [PHQ-9 Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/phq-9-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of PHQ-9 depression scores
- [GAD-7 Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/gad-7-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of GAD-7 anxiety scores
- [AUDIT Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/audit-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of AUDIT alcohol screening scores
- [AUDIT-C Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/audit-c-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of AUDIT-C alcohol scores
- [DAST-10 Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/dast-10-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of DAST-10 drug screening scores
- [DASS-21 Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/dass-21-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of DASS-21 depression, anxiety, and stress scores
- [PCL-5 Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/pcl-5-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of PCL-5 PTSD screening scores
- [ASRS Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/asrs-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of ASRS ADHD screening scores
- [MDQ Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/mdq-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of MDQ bipolar screening scores
- [ACE Score Interpretation](https://mindchecktools.com/ace-score-interpretation): Detailed interpretation of ACE adverse childhood experiences scores

## Blog — Score Guides

- [What Does Your PHQ-9 Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-phq-9-score-mean): PHQ-9 scores range 0–27; learn what each severity level means and what to do next
- [What Does Your GAD-7 Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-gad-7-score-mean): GAD-7 scores range 0–21; learn what minimal, mild, moderate, and severe mean
- [What Does Your AUDIT Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-audit-score-mean): AUDIT scores range 0–40; learn what each risk zone means
- [What Does Your PCL-5 Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-pcl-5-score-mean): PCL-5 scores range 0–80; learn what the clinical cutoff means
- [What Does Your ASRS Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-asrs-score-mean): Learn what a positive ASRS ADHD screen means and what to do next
- [What Does Your ACE Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-ace-score-mean): ACE scores range 0–10; learn how childhood adversity affects adult health
- [What Does Your OCI-R Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-oci-r-score-mean): OCI-R scores range 0–72; learn what the clinical cutoff and subscales mean
- [What Does Your PC-PTSD-5 Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-pc-ptsd-5-score-mean): PC-PTSD-5 scores range 0–5; learn what a positive screen means
- [What Does Your CAGE-AID Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-cage-aid-score-mean): CAGE-AID scores range 0–4; a score of 2+ suggests possible substance use concern
- [What Does Your PSS Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-pss-score-mean): PSS-10 scores range 0–40; learn what your perceived stress level indicates
- [What Does Your Rosenberg Self-Esteem Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-rosenberg-self-esteem-score-mean): Rosenberg scores range 0–30; learn how self-esteem connects to mental health
- [DASS-21 Score Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/dass-21-score-guide): DASS-21 scores range 0–42 per subscale; learn severity levels for depression, anxiety, and stress
- [PHQ-9 vs GAD-7: Which Should You Take?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/phq-9-vs-gad-7): How the PHQ-9 and GAD-7 differ and when to take each

## Blog — Tool Guides

- [PHQ-9 Explained](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/phq-9-guide): How clinicians use the PHQ-9 depression questionnaire and what it cannot tell you
- [What Is the PHQ-9?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-is-phq-9-depression-screener): Complete guide to the PHQ-9 depression screener — how it works and who developed it
- [GAD-7 Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/gad-7-guide): What the GAD-7 anxiety scale measures and how doctors interpret scores
- [AUDIT Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/audit-guide): How the WHO AUDIT alcohol screening tool works and why clinicians use it
- [DAST-10 Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/dast-10-guide): How the DAST-10 drug screening is scored and what results mean
- [PTSD Screening Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/ptsd-screening-guide): When and why to get screened for PTSD, and how the PCL-5 and PC-PTSD-5 work
- [Depression Screening Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/depression-screening-guide): Complete guide to depression screening, USPSTF guidelines, and treatment options
- [Understanding Your Screening Results](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/understanding-mental-health-screening-results): What screening results mean, what they do not mean, and practical next steps

## Blog — Condition and Population Guides

- [What Is Anxiety?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-is-anxiety): Symptoms, types, and evidence-based treatment for anxiety disorders
- [What Is Generalized Anxiety Disorder?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-is-generalized-anxiety-disorder): Deep dive into GAD symptoms, causes, and treatments
- [What Is Social Anxiety Disorder?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-is-social-anxiety-disorder): How social anxiety differs from introversion and what treatments work
- [What Is OCD?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-is-ocd): OCD symptoms, misconceptions, and evidence-based treatment
- [OCD Myths vs Reality](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-ocd-looks-like): What OCD actually looks like beyond the stereotypes
- [What Is Bipolar Disorder?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-is-bipolar-disorder): Types, symptoms, and treatment for bipolar I and II
- [Bipolar vs Depression](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/bipolar-vs-depression): Key differences between bipolar disorder and depression
- [What Is ADHD in Adults?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-is-adhd-in-adults): Adult ADHD symptoms, why it is often missed, and effective treatment
- [Adult ADHD Signs](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/adult-adhd-signs): Common signs of ADHD in adults that are often overlooked
- [What Is Alcohol Use Disorder?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-is-alcohol-use-disorder): AUD symptoms, risk factors, and evidence-based treatments
- [What Are Substance Use Disorders?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-are-substance-use-disorders): Signs, diagnosis, and treatment for substance use disorders
- [Depression vs Anxiety](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/depression-vs-anxiety): How depression and anxiety overlap and how they differ
- [Anxiety vs Panic Attacks](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/anxiety-vs-panic-attacks): How anxiety and panic attacks differ and what to do for each
- [Social Anxiety vs Introversion](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/social-anxiety-vs-introversion): Understanding the difference between social anxiety and introversion
- [Understanding BPD](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/bpd-symptoms-guide): Borderline personality disorder symptoms, DSM-5 criteria, screening, and treatment
- [Postpartum Depression Symptoms](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/postpartum-depression-symptoms-guide): PPD signs, how it differs from baby blues, and when to get help
- [Burnout Symptoms](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/burnout-symptoms-guide): WHO definition, Maslach dimensions, and how burnout differs from depression
- [Attachment Styles Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/attachment-styles-guide): The four attachment styles and how early bonds shape adult relationships
- [Autism Screening for Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/autism-screening-adults-guide): Signs of autism in adults, masking, and how the AQ-10 screening works
- [Understanding Grief](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/grief-stages-guide): Stages of grief, prolonged grief disorder, and when to seek help
- [Compassion Fatigue Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/compassion-fatigue-guide): Signs, prevention, and recovery for caregivers and helpers
- [Insomnia Screening Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/insomnia-test-guide): Insomnia signs, the Athens Insomnia Scale, and CBT-I as first-line treatment
- [Standard Drinks and BAC](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/standard-drinks-bac-guide): What a standard drink is, how BAC works, and NIAAA low-risk guidelines
- [Eating Disorder Signs](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/eating-disorder-signs): Types, warning signs, and how the SCOFF screening works
- [ACE Score Meaning](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/ace-score-meaning): What your ACE score means and why resilience matters more than the number
- [Loneliness and Mental Health](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/loneliness-mental-health): How chronic loneliness affects mental and physical health
- [Seasonal Affective Disorder](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/seasonal-affective-disorder): Understanding winter depression, light therapy, and when to seek help
- [Depression in Older Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/depression-seniors-guide): Signs that are often missed and why depression is not normal aging
- [Depression in New Moms](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/depression-new-moms-guide): Beyond baby blues — signs, risk factors, and how screening helps
- [Depression in Veterans](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/depression-veterans-guide): Why depression goes unrecognized in veterans and how to get support
- [Depression in Men](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/depression-men-guide): Why male depression looks different and goes untreated
- [Anxiety in Women](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/anxiety-women-guide): Why women are affected more and what hormones, trauma, and mental load contribute
- [Anxiety in Men](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/anxiety-men-guide): How male anxiety hides as anger, workaholism, and physical symptoms
- [PTSD in Veterans](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/ptsd-veterans-guide): Signs, screening, and getting the right support after military service
- [PTSD in First Responders](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/ptsd-first-responders-guide): The hidden cost of saving lives — cumulative trauma and confidential screening
- [ADHD in Women](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/adhd-women-guide): Why ADHD goes undiagnosed in women and how hormones affect symptoms
- [ADHD Test for Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/adhd-adults-guide): How to know if you should get screened for adult ADHD
- [Bipolar in Young Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/bipolar-young-adults-guide): Early signs and why bipolar is often misdiagnosed as depression
- [Depression in Teenagers](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/depression-teens-guide): Signs parents should know and how teen depression differs from adult depression
- [Anxiety in Teenagers](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/anxiety-teens-guide): How to recognize teen anxiety and what actually helps
- [OCD in Teenagers](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/ocd-teens-guide): What OCD looks like in teens and how ERP treatment works
- [ADHD in Teenagers](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/adhd-teens-guide): Signs, challenges, and how screening helps teens get support
- [Substance Use Screening for Teens](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/drug-screening-teens-guide): The CRAFFT screening tool and how to start a conversation
- [BPD in Young Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/bpd-young-adults-guide): Early signs, getting assessed, and finding help
- [BPD in Women](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/bpd-women-guide): Diagnosis, gender bias, and evidence-based treatment
- [Social Anxiety in College](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/social-anxiety-college-guide): How to recognize it and find support on campus
- [Alcohol Screening for College Students](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/alcohol-screening-college-guide): When social drinking becomes a problem
- [Alcohol Use in the Military](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/alcohol-screening-military-guide): Culture, risk, and confidential screening options
- [College Stress](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/stress-college-students-guide): When academic pressure becomes a mental health concern
- [Loneliness in Older Adults](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/loneliness-seniors-guide): Why it matters for health and what to do about it
- [Eating Disorders in Athletes](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/eating-disorder-athletes-guide): RED-S, sport-specific risks, and confidential screening
- [Substance Use Screening for Parents](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/substance-abuse-parents-guide): Honest assessment without judgment

## Blog — Burnout Population Guides

- [Burnout in Healthcare Workers](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/burnout-healthcare-workers-guide): Signs, causes, moral injury, and what actually helps
- [Nurse Burnout](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/burnout-nurses-guide): Why it happens, how it feels, and what to do about it
- [Teacher Burnout](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/burnout-teachers-guide): Signs, causes, and strategies for educators
- [Parental Burnout](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/burnout-parents-guide): When the demands of parenting become overwhelming
- [Caregiver Burnout](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/caregiver-burnout-guide): Signs, prevention, and getting help for yourself

## Blog — Recovery and Treatment

- [Stages of Change in Recovery](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/stages-of-change-recovery): The 5 stages of change model for addiction recovery
- [Quit Drinking Timeline](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/quit-drinking-timeline): Hour-by-hour timeline of what happens when you stop drinking
- [Relapse Prevention Plan Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/relapse-prevention-plan-guide): How to build a relapse prevention plan step by step
- [Relapse Prevention Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/relapse-prevention-guide): The three stages of relapse and how to intervene early
- [Trigger Identification Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/trigger-identification-guide): How to recognize and manage personal relapse triggers
- [Sobriety Calculator Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/sobriety-calculator-guide): Why tracking your sober days matters for recovery
- [Withdrawal Symptoms Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/withdrawal-symptoms-guide): What to expect by substance and when to seek medical help
- [Money Saved in Recovery](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/money-saved-recovery-guide): How sobriety changes your finances
- [Health Recovery Timeline](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/health-recovery-timeline-guide): What happens to your body after quitting substances
- [Treatment Cost Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/treatment-cost-guide): Addiction treatment costs, insurance, and how to pay
- [HALT Check-In Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/halt-checkin-guide): The recovery check-in that prevents relapse
- [Daily Recovery Check-In Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/daily-recovery-checkin-guide): Why structured self-reflection supports sobriety
- [Readiness to Change Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/readiness-to-change-guide): Assessing where you are in the change process
- [Coping Skills Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/coping-skills-guide): Evidence-based coping techniques that actually work
- [How Addiction Affects Families](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/family-impact-addiction-guide): Understanding the ripple effects on every family member
- [DBT Skills for Beginners](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/dbt-skills-beginners): The 4 DBT skill modules explained in plain language
- [Cognitive Distortions List](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/cognitive-distortions-list): 15 common thinking errors that fuel anxiety and depression
- [Anxiety Coping Strategies](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/anxiety-coping-strategies): Evidence-based techniques for managing anxiety symptoms

## Blog — Therapeutic Techniques

- [CBT Thought Records](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/cbt-thought-record-guide): How to challenge negative thinking patterns with the 7-column method
- [Urge Surfing Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/urge-surfing-guide): How to ride out cravings without giving in
- [Values Clarification Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/values-clarification-guide): How knowing what matters guides better decisions
- [Box Breathing Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/box-breathing-guide): A simple 4-4-4-4 technique for anxiety, stress, and panic
- [Grounding Techniques Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/grounding-techniques-guide): How the 5-4-3-2-1 method calms anxiety and dissociation
- [Worry Time Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/worry-time-guide): How scheduling your worries reduces anxiety
- [DBT Crisis Survival Skills](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/dbt-crisis-skills-guide): What to do when you cannot think straight
- [Safety Planning Guide](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/safety-planning-guide): A step-by-step guide to creating your crisis plan

## Blog — Help-Seeking and Wellness

- [When Should I See a Therapist?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/when-should-i-see-a-therapist): 10 signs it may be time to talk to a mental health professional
- [How to Find a Therapist](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/how-to-find-a-therapist): Step-by-step guide to finding a therapist that fits your needs and budget
- [How to Talk to Your Doctor About Mental Health](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/how-to-talk-to-doctor-about-mental-health): What to say, how to prepare, and how to use your screening results
- [How to Support Someone With a Mental Health Condition](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/how-to-support-someone-with-mental-health-condition): What actually helps and what to avoid
- [How to Help a Family Member With Addiction](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/helping-family-member-addiction): Boundaries, enabling, self-care, and support resources for families
- [Mental Health and Sleep](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/mental-health-and-sleep): The bidirectional relationship between sleep and mental health
- [Sleep and Mood](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/sleep-and-mood): How sleep affects mood and why poor sleep makes everything harder
- [Mental Health Stigma](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/mental-health-stigma): What stigma is, why it persists, and what actually reduces it
- [Work Stress vs Burnout](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/work-stress-vs-burnout): How to tell the difference and what online quizzes cannot tell you

## About

- [About MindCheck Tools](https://mindchecktools.com/about): Mission, methodology, and clinical review process
- [Jason Ramirez, CADC-II](https://mindchecktools.com/about/jason-ramirez): Certified Drug and Alcohol Counselor with 11 years of clinical experience — reviews all tools and content
- [Privacy Policy](https://mindchecktools.com/privacy): All screening results processed client-side; no health data stored or transmitted
- [Contact](https://mindchecktools.com/contact): Reach the MindCheck Tools team
- [Crisis Resources](https://mindchecktools.com/crisis-resources): 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline, Crisis Text Line, SAMHSA Helpline

## Crisis Resources

If you are in crisis: call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline), text HOME to 741741 (Crisis Text Line), or call 1-800-662-4357 (SAMHSA National Helpline). All free, 24/7.
